en.header.title: Spratley
en.game.blurb.farcry6: Joined as an intern in 2020 and started full-time 2021. Various polish and bugfixing work for the main campaign. Feature owner of the Kukly enemies for the Stranger Things crossover.
en.game.blurb.farcry6_dlc: Feature owner for the new Crystal Shardface enemies and FAI's hub world appearance. Facilitated team meetings to iterate on new features for enemy behavior and non-human dialogue sequences.
en.aboutme.intro: I'm Jacob Pratley, I make games!

ja.header.title: スプラトリー
ja.game.blurb.farcry6: Joined as an intern in 2020 and started full-time 2021. Various polish and bugfixing work for the main campaign. Feature owner of the ククリ enemies for the ストレンジャー・シングス crossover.
ja.game.title.farcry6_dlc: ファークライ6: 狭間の世界
ja.game.blurb.farcry6_dlc: Feature owner for the new クリスタル・シャードフェイス enemies and フェイの hub world appearance. Facilitated team meetings to iterate on new features for enemy behavior and non-human dialogue sequences.
ja.aboutme.intro: 私はプラトリー・ジェイコブ、ゲームを作ります!
